author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — owner-level pervasive observability change (every execute_* function across src/tools/*).

**Fix outline:** Add tracing instrumentation to every tool execution path: src/tools/bash/mod.rs, src/tools/file/{read,write,edit,list,notebook}.rs, src/tools/chainlink.rs, src/tools/web.rs, src/tools/worktree.rs, src/tools/cron.rs, src/tools/task.rs, src/tools/ask_user.rs, src/tools/plan_mode.rs, src/tools/lsp.rs. Pattern: #[tracing::instrument(skip(args), fields(tool = 'bash', cmd = %args.get('command')...))] on each execute_* fn, with debug! on entry, info! on completion (with duration_ms), warn!/error! on the is_error path. Provides parity with the MCP path which already uses tracing.

**Recommendation:** Pervasive change touching ~12 files. Owner-level decisions on (a) span structure / naming, (b) which fields are PII-safe to log (tool args contain user prompts, file paths, shell commands), (c) integration with the existing tracing-subscriber config. Defer; possibly combine with a structured-logging migration.
